summary: Crisp soundboard capture of a high‑energy Pigpen‑filled party show featuring scorching Hard to Handle, epic Good Lovin’, King Bee, Lovelight and a wild Truckin’ jam.
review: The recording is a clean soundboard source that’s very crisp but a touch bright in the treble. Musically it’s a rocking Pigpen showcase – the band turns up the heat on Hard to Handle, a long Good Lovin’, King Bee, Lovelight and an outrageous Truckin’/NFA>GDTR>NFA sequence – delivering a party atmosphere that leaves listeners smiling.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong, energetic performance with several standout songs and a clear soundboard recording; minor treble brightness keeps overall rating just below top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very crisp and clear, slightly high on the treble but not shrill; no major drop‑outs reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy first set leading into a second set dominated by Pigpen, maintaining momentum with powerful blues numbers and an expansive Truckin' jam.
